test_type: Frontend + Backend - CR-016 P20-Phase2 Stock Inventory Hierarchy Toggle
summary: Verified all CR-016 features: hierarchy toggle visible for master user, hidden for franchise user. Toggle ON shows 4th KPI card 'Stores in Scope', low-stock alert banner, and store heatmap grid with clickable cards sorted worst-first. Toggle OFF hides hierarchy section while own-store table remains functional. Search, sort, category filter, and CSV export all working.

tests.details: GET /api/ returns 200 with message 'Central Inventory API Proxy'.
Login successful with credentials manager@germanfluid.com / Qplazm@10. Returns token, restaurant_id=806, restaurant_type_flag='master'.

tests.feature: Navigate to /inventory → page loads with KPI cards, inventory table
tests.details: Stock Inventory page loads with 3 KPI cards (Total Items: 47, Low Stock Items: 1, Categories: 4) and inventory table with search, sort, category filter.

tests.feature: Hierarchy toggle switch is VISIBLE for Central Store (master) user
tests.details: data-testid='hierarchy-toggle-container' and data-testid='hierarchy-toggle' both visible. Toggle shows 'My store' label when OFF.

tests.feature: Toggle ON → 4th KPI card 'Stores in Scope' appears
tests.details: data-testid='kpi-stores-in-scope' appears showing '6 Stores in Scope' when toggle is checked.

tests.feature: Toggle ON → low-stock alert banner appears if low_stock_rows > 0
tests.details: data-testid='hierarchy-low-stock-alert' shows '52 low stock items across 6 stores'.

tests.feature: Toggle ON → Store heatmap grid appears with per-store cards
tests.details: data-testid='store-heatmap' appears with 6 heatmap cards showing store name, type, and low-stock ratio. Cards sorted worst-first (Central Kitchen Beta 11/11 first, german fluid 1/47 last).

tests.feature: Heatmap cards are clickable and navigate to /store/{id}
tests.details: Clicked heatmap-card-808 (Central Kitchen Beta), navigated to /store/808 showing store details, stock summary, and recent transactions.

tests.feature: Toggle OFF → hierarchy section disappears, own-store table stays
tests.details: When toggle unchecked: kpi-stores-in-scope, hierarchy-low-stock-alert, and store-heatmap all hidden. Inventory table remains visible. Toggle label shows 'My store'.

tests.feature: Login as Outlet (manager@outletdirectone.com) → toggle is HIDDEN
tests.details: Logged in as franchise user (restaurant_type_flag='franchise'). hierarchy-toggle-container and hierarchy-toggle NOT present in DOM. Only 3 KPI cards visible (no 'Stores in Scope').

tests.feature: Own-store inventory table works with search, sort, category filter
tests.details: Search 'Baking' returns 2 rows, search 'coffee' returns 1 row. Sort and category filter dropdowns functional. Row click navigates to /inventory/{id} detail page.
Clicked export-inventory-csv button, downloaded stock_inventory.csv successfully.

critical_code_review_comments: api.js Line 594: _getStockInventory correctly accepts { includeHierarchy } param and appends ?include_hierarchy=true to URL
useStockInventory.js Line 14: canToggleHierarchy = isTopLevel || isMiddleLevel correctly gates toggle visibility
useStockInventory.js Line 32: includeHierarchy param correctly passed to API when showHierarchy && canToggleHierarchy
StockInventorySummary.jsx Line 179-189: Hierarchy toggle container only renders when canToggleHierarchy is true
StockInventorySummary.jsx Line 279-291: 4th KPI card 'Stores in Scope' only renders when showHierarchy && hierarchySummary
StockInventorySummary.jsx Line 295-305: Low-stock alert banner only renders when showHierarchy && hierarchySummary?.totals?.low_stock_rows > 0
StockInventorySummary.jsx Line 470-492: Store heatmap grid renders with cards sorted by low-stock ratio (worst-first) using .sort((a, b) => ratioB - ratioA)
StockInventorySummary.jsx Line 504-546: StoreHeatmapCard component correctly handles onClick navigation to /store/{id}
seed_data_creation: None - used existing POS API data via proxy
context_for_next_testing_agent: CR-016 P20-Phase2 Stock Inventory Hierarchy Toggle fully verified. Master user (restaurant_type_flag='master') sees toggle, franchise user (restaurant_type_flag='franchise') does not. Toggle ON shows 4th KPI card, alert banner, and store heatmap with 6 stores. Heatmap cards sorted worst-first by low-stock ratio. All existing functionality (search, sort, filter, CSV export, row navigation) continues to work.
